title: urtica pendula
intro: Urtica pendula, also known as stinging nettle tree, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of iridoid glycosides, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Urtica pendula include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate allergies, and support digestive health. Urtica pendula can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine for their therapeutic effects.
